title: CC narrative review S15 panel a1

payload.notes:
S15 is the resolution/verdict beat of the B08 inflation-audit climax (S12 +6.2 looks-real → S13 sanitizer cheat found → S14 collapse to +1.4 → S15 verdict). NARRATIVE-ONLY judgment of panels/S15_panel_a01.png.

BEAT FIDELITY 5/5 — The panel lands the exact verdict payload the arc was building toward. The baked 'VERDICT - WARN_corrected' header plus the visible claim-audit / research-wiki content reads as the audit closing the loop: the inflated +6.2 headline (S12) was traced to the JSON sanitizer self-repair (S13), honestly re-scored to the raw +1.4 (S14), and S15 stamps the corrected verdict and writes it into the wiki as active memory. The duo (executor + reviewer) is staged around the verdict/wiki visualization so the meaning — 'we caught our own inflation and recorded the corrected result' — is unambiguous; this is the clean resolution the rollback arc needed.

COMPOSITION (STORY) 5/5 — Reading order flows verdict header -> WARN_corrected stamp -> claim_id / research-wiki record cleanly, and the cell stays distinct from S12 (inflated entry), S13 (diagnosis) and S14 (collapse). The corrected-verdict payload and the wiki-write payload both land visually without leaning on text alone. Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / baked-text legibility / content-corruption are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
